description: Limited-time food menu collaboration featuring a celebrity or international personality, creating exclusive product variants tied to their name and brand.
structural_recipe: Post features exclusive celebrity-designed menu item(s) with clear launch date window, celebrity name prominently attached to product, high-quality product photography, and time-bound CTA. Include NEW label for exclusivity, specific dates (3–8 day window), flavor names, and hero emoji (🍓🍽️). Lead with excitement-generating copy ('llego y tienes que probarlo').
why_it_works: Saudi audiences show strong affinity for aspirational international collaborations and exclusive limited-time offerings. Celebrity endorsement creates FOMO and cultural prestige, while time-bound promotions drive immediate action. Food collaborations with Western personalities signal modernity and global access.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure celebrity choice aligns with Saudi cultural values and isn't controversial locally
Verify no alcohol or pork references in menu items
Respect prayer times in messaging and scheduling
Localize celebrity relevance—international personalities must have regional recognition
cultural_constraints: Celebrity must maintain family-friendly, modest public image
Avoid female celebrities in suggestive poses or contexts
Limited-time framing must respect Islamic calendar considerations
